stemHtml: An aeroplane is descending from FL 390 to ground level at maximum speed. The limit(s) in speed is (are):

options.a: M<sub>MO</sub> only during all the descent.
options.b: V<sub>MO</sub> only during all the descent.
options.c: initially M<sub>MO</sub>, then V<sub>MO</sub> below a given flight level.
options.d: initially V<sub>MO</sub>, then M<sub>MO</sub> below a given flight level.
